description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a medium-sized parrot perched on a branch, with a predominantly pale gray plumage and a slightly raised crest on its head. The bird's beak is robust and curved, colored in a muted beige tone, and its eyes are set forward, giving it a focused expression. The wings are folded neatly against its body, and the tail feathers are long and straight, extending downward. The legs and feet are short and sturdy, gripping the branch securely, and are colored a dark gray. The surface texture of the feathers appears matte with subtle shading, giving a lifelike impression of soft plumage. The overall form is streamlined, with smooth transitions between the head, body, and tail.
description: A pale gray parrot with a raised crest, curved beige beak, and long straight tail perched on a branch. The bird has a matte, soft-feathered appearance and a focused expression.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the bird's face, raised crest, and detailed beak, with the left wing and tail visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full profile of the head, beak, and body, with the branch and both feet visible.
description_view_2: Rear-left view focusing on the back of the head, body, and tail, with minimal facial features visible.
description_view_3: Direct rear view showing the back, tail, and subtle feather pattern, with the head turned slightly to the left.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid pale gray with subtle shading and a slightly lighter crest
